title: Shizuku Precipitation Viewer
summary: Real-time precipitation visualization platform for Medellín with microservices and Flutter front-end.
description: Shizuku Precipitation Viewer delivers an elegant, real‑time map of rainfall over Medellín, powered by a microservices backend in Go and Python and a sleek Flutter frontend. Deployed via Docker, the project ingests live meteorological feeds to render up‑to‑the‑minute precipitation data for developers, urban planners, and weather enthusiasts.
